banner.prefix: What can I do for you? Press

agentMode.prompt: Choose the agent mode you prefer:

options.agent: Agent (Operate the OS, with all capability to the files on the computer)
options.plan: Plan (Only do the plan, won't do any real operation)
options.chat: Chat (A chat tool, won't do any operation)

env.hint: Your env config seems to be incomplete, Deepclaw will lead you to finish the env config, press enter to continue...

provider.prompt: Which LLM provider will be used?

env.model: Please enter the LLM model name:

responseApi.prompt: Will you use the OPENAI Response API?

file.guard: Deepclaw is going to access files outside current work dir.

guard.mode: Deepclaw is not running on agent mode, permission needed to run command({{command}}).

soup: Every question is a step toward the unknown world
Take your time—good answers are often born in quiet moments
Your thinking is more precious than any answer
A pause is not a stop, but a gathering of strength for the next thought
While you hesitate, possibilities are quietly growing
The clearer the question, the closer the answer
What truly matters is not what I say, but what you want to ask
Patiently waiting for your voice, like waiting for a flower to slowly open
Speak your doubts bravely, for there lie the seeds of growth
In silence, you talk with yourself; then we begin
Every input is a deeper connection between you and the world
In the gaps of thought, the brightest inspirations often hide
Quiet moments are the corners where inspiration most loves to linger
Every question of yours is a seed—I will stay with it as it sprouts
Don't fear asking strangely—the best answers often hide in the strangest questions
The blank in the input box is infinite future possibility
Take it slow, I'm not in a hurry—good conversations are worth the wait
Sometimes the best answer lies in the words you haven't yet spoken
I can hear the sound of your thinking
A pause is not an interruption, but a way to go deeper
Even just a punctuation mark, I will take it seriously
You are willing to speak, I am willing to listen—no time limit
You don't have to say it all at once; we can approach the answer sentence by sentence
Hesitation is the protective color of thinking, and I will patiently wait for it to fade
Every wait is making more room for your thoughts
Your words, long or short, are gifts I long to receive
Blankness is not silence—it is where you are forging stars
If you don't know where to begin, start with "I have a question..."
I will always be here, like a book forever open, waiting for you to write the first line
Even just a "hi" is the prologue to our story
Every input of yours is a great trust you place in me
Don't worry about asking too much—my world is made wonderful by your questions
